Wait, in SPARQL, UNION needs to have the pattern blocks inside braces. So the correct syntax is to have:

{
  ... pattern 1 ...
}
UNION
{
  ... pattern 2 ...
}

So the correct query is:

SELECT DISTINCT ?date WHERE {
  {
    ?match wdt:P378 wd:Q411525;
           wdt:P1343 wd:Q41533;
           wdt:P1342 wd:Q162268;
           wdt:P585 ?date.
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?match wdt:P378 wd:Q411525;
           wdt:P1343 wd:Q162268;
           wdt:P1342 wd:Q41533;
           wdt:P585 ?date.
